title: Software Update - DFU is not available if phone's battery is below 30%
scenario: DFU process blocked with low battery pop-up when phone battery is below 30% in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the phone.
2. Ensure the phone's battery level is below 30%.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Locate and tap the DFU (Device Firmware Update) option.
5. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
expected: A pop-up appears stating the device battery doesn't have enough power to update the software, advising the user to fully charge the device or plug it into a power source. Tapping OK returns the user to the Settings page without starting the DFU process.
